title: Superflat Dimensions
description: Collection of datapacks that create Superflat Overworld, Nether, and End Dimensions, with all Structures and Biomes.
body:
# Superflat Dimensions Datapack Collection
This is a <u>collection of datapacks</u> that overrides the default world generation to functionally apply superflat to all dimensions, while retaining all biomes and structures.

### Please note when using this, just add the datapack on the world creation screen and create a world like normal. <u>You should not to use the Superflat Preset.</u>

<details>
<summary>Why does it replace the default overworld, and why can't it use a preset?</summary>
Datapacks allow creators to edit many things in Minecraft, but some things are hardcoded, meaning they require a mod to change. Datapacks do allow for custom superflat presets, but unfortunately they only allow for single-biome worlds. Datapacks also allow for custom world presets, but unfortunately, any changes outside of the terrain must be done <u>globally</u>, meaning anytime I need to change the structure or feature generation to get it to fit, it would change it for all presets. If I made a preset and someone was using the mod version of this pack, then they could easily be unknowingly altering vanilla worldgen!
</details>

## Compatibility Notes:
These datapacks do not work with any biome mods! There is a technical reason behind this because of the limitations of datapacks. I may be able to look into resolving this with [Lithostitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithostitched) though.

If you've never used terrain mods together, you should know that they generally override each other. The same case is for this mod.

# Versions:

### <u>Classic Superflat Dimensions</u>

Three blocks of terrain and one block of bedrock at y=0. No trees/foliage, caves, or ores. Just structures and biomes. 
*Modeled after the "Classic" Superflat preset*

### <u>Superflat Dimensions</u>

Exactly like the Classic Superflat Dimensions, but with trees and other biome features!

## "I wish the world actually had terrain from -64 to 64..." / "Where did 'Flat Dimensions' Go?"
### <u>Checkout [Flat Dimensions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/flat-dimensions) (BEING REVIEWED)</u>

## Generation Notes:
Pre-1.21.2 Only
   - Phantoms can only spawn above Y=63
   - Most aquatic mobs can only spawn from ~Y=50 to Y=63
